name: Building Services
narrativeHook: The building services office is a cramped room of whiteboards and duty rosters. The cleaning schedules are posted on the wall — but certain floors are conspicuously absent. Someone has been keeping their own records.
storyArc: The agent discovers that entire floor ranges are excluded from the cleaning rota: floors 51-55, 61-65, 71-75, and 86-100. These are the Black Meridian, BioSciences, Nightfall Ops, and Apex floors. Maria Dos Santos, a cleaning supervisor, kept a private notebook in locker 4C-22 documenting the excluded floors before she was reassigned. Her colleague Roberto Silva asked too many questions and was transferred to Meridian's Sao Paulo office — effectively disappeared. The excluded floor pattern maps precisely to the conspiracy operations.

characters.role: Player — investigating cleaning schedules and missing staff
Dex confirms the excluded floors — 'We don't go above 50 much, and never to certain ones'

objectives.description: Identify the excluded cleaning floors: 51-55, 61-65, 71-75, and 86-100. These floors are serviced by unknown personnel.
Find Maria's notebook in locker 4C-22 documenting anomalies on the excluded floors — strange smells, sounds of machinery, guards with no name badges.
Discover that Roberto Silva was transferred to Sao Paulo after questioning the excluded floor policy — an enforced disappearance.

elevatorKey.description: Maria's notebook contains a scrawled floor plan annotation that serves as the elevator key.

documentSpecs.description: Monthly cleaning rotas for Q4 2024 and Q1 2025. Floors 1-50 fully covered. Floors 51-55, 61-65, 71-75, 86-100 listed as 'N/A — alternative servicing'.
Maria's private notebook from locker 4C-22. Handwritten observations: chemical smells from floor 62, humming machinery floor 72, guards with blank badges floors 51-55.
Roberto Silva's transfer paperwork — 'reassigned to Meridian International, Sao Paulo office' dated Nov 2024. No forwarding contact. Maria Dos Santos — still on staff but moved to night shift only.
Building services emails. Roberto's email asking 'why can't we clean floor 53?' followed by Maggie Chen's reply: 'Security Division handles those. Don't ask again.' Transfer notice 3 days later.
Staff assignment sheets. Roberto's name crossed out and replaced mid-month. Maria moved from day to night shift same week.
Building services locker assignments. 4C-22 assigned to 'M. Dos Santos'. Contents: personal notebook, cleaning supplies, photo of family.
Routine cleaning supply orders, equipment maintenance, uniform requests, shift swaps, holiday cover arrangements.
Health and safety notices, chemical handling procedures, waste disposal protocols, recycling guidelines.
